html:
Exclusive to:

“The longer you gaze, the stronger the urge to leap.”

-

The Chasm is naturally spawning object exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Ancient Echoes. It can be found in the lobby of Sanctum. Jumping in the Chasm will take players to the Sealed Portal in Ancient Archive.

A rope can be tied to the rock of the Chasm, creating a way for players to climb up from Sealed Portal to the lobby of Sanctum.

Key Room

Another Chasm can be found in the Key Room. It opens after Keystone is taken from Reliquary. Jumping in will take players to the Ancient Orchestrina in Ancient Archive.

DSTDSRoGSWHam
plainText:
Chasm
Chasm
With Rope
Source
Sanctum
Miscellaneous
"vault_lobby_exit"
Exclusive to:
“If I tied a rope, I could climb back out.”
–Wilson
“I guess I could always tie a rope if I wanted to come back.”
–Willow
“Too dark to see bottom... maybe Wolfgang climb down with rope, just to be safe.”
–Wolfgang
“A sturdy rope and a quick drop will see me to the other side.”
–Wendy
“TOGGLE "ROPE" TO MAINTAIN ACCESS”
–WX-78
“Utilizing a rope for my descent might be prudent.”
–Wickerbottom
“Throwin' a line down would make it a lot easier to come back up.”
–Woodie
“I should secure a rope, in case I ever need to return.”
–Maxwell
“I öught tö let döwn a length öf röpe, shöuld I wish tö venture this way again.”
–Wigfrid
“Maybe we should leave a rope behind, so we can climb back out.”
–Webber
“A rope would make my descent slightly less nerve-wracking, non?”
–Warly
“Leave friend string for climbing?”
–Wormwood
“Better let down a rope in case I ever wanna come back this way.”
–Winona
“Should I need to retreat, a rope can't be beat!”
–Wortox
“Hmm... could climb back if had rope...”
–Wurt
“You should always use a safety rope when you're exploring a cave!”
–Walter
“Perhaps I should make a tether before I go jumping into a gaping void.”
–Wanda
“The longer you gaze, the stronger the urge to leap.”
-
The Chasm is naturally spawning object exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Ancient Echoes. It can be found in the lobby of Sanctum. Jumping in the Chasm will take players to the Sealed Portal in Ancient Archive.
A rope can be tied to the rock of the Chasm, creating a way for players to climb up from Sealed Portal to the lobby of Sanctum.
Key Room[edit | edit source]
Chasm
Open
Closed
Miscellaneous
"vault_key_exit"
“I can't tie a rope here.”
–Wilson
“Can't tie a rope? Who cares!”
–Willow
“Nowhere for Wolfgang to tie rope!”
–Wolfgang
“It's a leap of faith.”
–Wendy
“NO RETURN FUNCTION”
–WX-78
“Since there is no place to tie a rope, one may not climb back up.”
–Wickerbottom
“Can't tie a rope here, eh?”
–Woodie
“Can't tie a rope? How exciting.”
–Maxwell
“Nöwhere tö anchör a röpe? A true warriör needeth nö secönd plan.”
–Wigfrid
“We can't climb out? Okay!”
–Webber
“I cannot climb back up!”
–Warly
“Nowhere tie helpful friend?”
–Wormwood
“Well, looks like it's exit only.”
–Winona
“There's no hope for a rope!”
–Wortox
“What mean can't climb out?”
–Wurt
“Looks like a one-way, Woby!”
–Walter
“I can't tie a rope here.”
–Wanda
Another Chasm can be found in the Key Room. It opens after Keystone is taken from Reliquary. Jumping in will take players to the Ancient Orchestrina in Ancient Archive.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Vực thẳm là vật thể sinh sản tự nhiên dành riêng cho Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong Ancient Echoes. Nó có thể được tìm thấy ở sảnh của Sanctum. Nhảy vào Vực thẳm sẽ đưa người chơi đến Cổng bị phong ấn trong Kho lưu trữ cổ.

{{Scrapbook Info|The longer you gaze, the stronger the urge to leap.}}
The '''Chasm''' is naturally spawning object exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[Ancient Echoes]]''. It can be found in the lobby of [[Sanctum]]. Jumping in the Chasm will take players to the [[Sealed Portal]] in [[Ancient Archive]].

A rope can be tied to the rock of the Chasm, creating a way for players to climb up from Sealed Portal to the lobby of [[Sanctum]].
